<includeonly>{{!}}- style="border-top: 2px #b38600 solid"
{{!}} {{Cp|{{#sub:{{{1}}}|0|1}}n{{#sub:{{{1}}}|2}}}}
{{!}} {{Cp|{{#sub:{{{1}}}|0|1}}c{{#sub:{{{1}}}|2}}}}
{{!}} {{Cp|{{#sub:{{{1}}}|0|1}}k{{#sub:{{{1}}}|2}}}}
{{!}} {{Cp|{{{1}}}}}
{{!}} {{Cp|{{#sub:{{{1}}}|0|1}}d{{#sub:{{{1}}}|2}}}}
{{#if:{{{teaser|}}}|{{!}}-
{{!}} colspan="5" {{!}} {{Cp|{{#sub:{{{1}}}|0|1}}r{{#sub:{{{1}}}|2}}}}
}}</includeonly>
